description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright and facing forward. He is dressed in a casual short-sleeve polo shirt and fitted pants, complemented by athletic sneakers. A crossbody bag with a visible branded strap is slung diagonally across his torso, and he wears a wrist accessory on his left arm. His hair is styled in short, neat braids that fall just above the shoulders. The overall appearance is modern and urban, suitable for a city or street environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a crossbody bag, short braided hair, and athletic sneakers, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, crossbody bag strap, wrist accessory, and full outfit details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, bag's side, and the fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, pants, and the crossbody bag's strap across the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, arm position, and the bag's placement.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve polo shirt and fitted pants with a crossbody bag
